item.title: Met Opera's 2026-27 season has 17 productions, its fewest in at least 60 years
item.description: The Metropolitan Opera cut back its 2026-27 season due to a tight budget, even as ticket sales improved slightly

item.title: Average US long-term mortgage rate dips to 6.01%, lowest level in more than 3 years
item.description: The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate slipped this week to its lowest level in more than three years, but remains around 6% in the same narrow rang...

item.title: US trade deficit declined in 2025, but gap for goods hits a record despite Trump tariffs
item.description: The U.S. trade deficit slipped modestly in 2025, a year in which President Donald Trump upended global commerce by slapping double digit tariffs on im...

item.title: As the US population ages, more employees are seeking caregiver benefits at work
item.description: More than 63 million Americans provide care for an adult family member, and most of them have regular paid jobs as well, according to AARP

item.title: US applications for jobless aid fall to 206,000 last week as layoffs remain low
item.description: U.S. applications for unemployment benefits fell last week as layoffs remain at historically low levels
